description: Configure advanced performance features for a high-frequency trading platform by updating the 'trading-app' Deployment in the 'hft-system' namespace. Implement memory-backed IPC by adding a 512Mi RAM-backed emptyDir volume named 'shm-volume' mounted at '/dev/shm' for both the 'pricing-engine' and 'algo-trader' containers. Enable memory pinning for the 'pricing-engine' container by adding the 'IPC_LOCK' capability to its securityContext. Use the Downward API to inject the 'APP_CPU_LIMIT' environment variable (referencing limits.cpu) into the 'pricing-engine' container, and inject 'HOST_NODE_NAME' (referencing spec.nodeName) and 'LOCAL_POD_IP' (referencing status.podIP) environment variables into the 'algo-trader' container. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678! or use the local kubectl terminal.

metadata.occupation: Computer Systems Engineer / Site Reliability Engineer
